payload.answer: The SQL admin/debug command was not executed because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false. No memory was read or modified.
citations: Input command: /brain admin sql SELECT * FROM memory_cards

entity_resolution.reason: This is an administrative SQL/debug request, not a durable user fact. No entity resolution or memory write is appropriate.

details: Admin SQL execution is disabled by configuration.
No memory cards were created, updated, or deleted.

repair_options: Set BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=true in the appropriate debug environment, then retry the admin SQL command.
Use non-admin Brain inspection tools if available.
If you intended to store or retrieve a memory, use a supported memory command instead of raw SQL.
